name: Vagaro Salon & Spa Management API
what_it_does: Vagaro REST API for salon, spa, and fitness business management platform. Enables AI agents to manage client profiles and appointment history, book and manage appointments and classes, process payments and memberships, track inventory and product sales, manage staff schedules, handle online booking workflows, and integrate client data with marketing and loyalty systems.
use_cases: Booking and managing client appointments from wellness business automation agents
Managing client profiles and visit history from customer relationship agents
Processing memberships and package renewals from billing automation agents
Syncing appointment data with marketing platforms from client engagement agents
not_for: Medical spa with clinical healthcare requirements without beauty salon focus
Enterprise wellness without individual appointment scheduling
Gym management without salon/spa appointment booking workflows
best_when: A salon, spa, fitness studio, or wellness business using Vagaro wants AI agents to automate appointment booking, manage client communications, process memberships, and handle staff scheduling.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Client health, beauty, and payment information is sensitive personal data. Medical spa client data may have additional healthcare privacy requirements.

auth.notes: Vagaro uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Business-level credentials per Vagaro account. Partner program for third-party integrations. OAuth scopes control access to bookings, clients, and financial data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free trial; API access on paid plans
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-location monthly pricing based on business size; API for integration partners
pricing.notes: Pleasanton, CA company, founded 2009. Large consumer marketplace for beauty/wellness alongside business SaaS. Over 220K businesses. Strong in salons, spas, barbershops, and fitness studios.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Client health, beauty, and payment data is sensitive personal information
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 partner program
US data residency only — verify for international salon/spa chains
Marketplace vs SaaS distinction — API primarily for business management, not consumer marketplace
Medical spa client data may have additional HIPAA-adjacent privacy requirements
Partner program required for production integration access
agent_readiness.security_notes: Client health/beauty and payment data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency only. Marketplace + SaaS hybrid platform.

security_score_components.security_notes: Client health and payment data. PCI-DSS, SOC2. OAuth2. US data residency only.
